segments.text: Alright, PK Thunder, PK Thunder, PK Thunder - on the third one he cleanly shuts it down with a dair, but...
segments.original_text: さあPKサンダーPKサンダーPKサンダー3回目はしっかりと空下で打ち消すが

segments.text: He also picks up the aerial cleanly, and then...
segments.original_text: さあ空打に対してもしっかり拾うそして

full_text: Alright, PK Thunder, PK Thunder, PK Thunder - on the third one he cleanly shuts it down with a dair, but... He also picks up the aerial cleanly, and then... Ledge grab!

corrections.rule: misheard: 空中したら→空下で
